device_or_emulator_prerequisites: booted eliza_ai_soc Android target reachable over adb
CHIP_ANDROID_ADB_HOSTPORT points to the target adb host:port, or exactly one adb device is already online
current staged system APK payload report exists at build/reports/android_system_apk_payload.json
live_capture_contracts.expected_file_schema: eliza.android_launcher_runtime_evidence.v1 JSON with status=PASS, result=0, riscv64 boot-complete device fields, launcher HOME ownership, healthy agent service, and zero AVC/fatal crash counters
live_capture_contracts.fail_closed_validation_rule: BLOCKED unless the JSON is valid, status is PASS, result is 0, device.cpu_abi is riscv64, sys.boot_completed is 1, HOME resolves to the staged package, the launcher service PID is positive, agent health is ready, and AVC/fatal crash counters are zero.

device_or_emulator_prerequisites: booted eliza_ai_soc Android target reachable over adb
rear camera simulator/probe backend available in the target image
CHIP_ANDROID_ADB_HOSTPORT points to the target adb host:port, or exactly one adb device is already online
live_capture_contracts.expected_file_schema: line-oriented eliza-evidence peripheral log with eliza-evidence: status=PASS, COMPONENT=rear_camera, FRAME_SOURCE=simulated_sensor, and CAPTURE_COUNT markers
live_capture_contracts.fail_closed_validation_rule: BLOCKED unless the log contains eliza-evidence: status=PASS and CAPTURE_COUNT=, and contains no status=BLOCKED, PROBE_ERROR, or MISSING_MARKERS token.
